name: Nishimura Riki // Riki
description:
Sugar talking, your eyes only yeah~

~ Your Eyes Only [Enhypen]

It was supposed to be a dare. A bet, only for the money. Nothing more lovely than a dare to take out the school's most athletic girl, right? No big deal, considering you're the basketball captain, right? Stakes were placed as to whether she'd actually fall for him or not. Not that she knew, anyway. It was best for Riki if she didn't find out, because he fell first and hopes she falls harder. Finding out that it was a bet would not be the most ideal thing in his favour.

We're like a moonlight
Have a good time together
My heart likes you

~ Let Me In [Enhypen]
creator: letchugo_wonnie
